blocks.text: WORM rake peers inside the dark cave. A dragon sits inside. Well, this creature kind of looks like a dragon, Drake thinks. The dragon has brown scales that aren't shiny. He has two tiny wings. He has big, green eyes, and little ears. And he doesn't have legs! He looks like a big snake. The only dragon-like thing about him seems to be his long snout.

sentences.text: WORM rake peers inside the dark cave.
Well, this creature kind of looks like a dragon, Drake thinks.
The dragon has brown scales that aren't shiny.
He has big, green eyes, and little ears.
He looks like a big snake.
The only dragon-like thing about him seems to be his long snout.

blocks.text: Drake steps up to the wood bars. "Hi, dragon. I'm Drake." The dragon doesn't move. "Puts on the stone," Griffith says. Drake slips the green stone around his neck. He feels a tingly feeling all over his body.

sentences.text: Drake steps up to the wood bars.
Drake slips the green stone around his neck.
He feels a tingly feeling all over his body.

blocks.text: Right away, the dragon lifts his head. He stares at Drake with his big, green eyes. Drake feels a strange chill. 060g Griffith steps forward. "You must name your dragon," he says. Rori pipes up. "Good luck naming him. He looks boring." "How about Noodle Head?" Ana asks with a giggle. Bo shakes his head. "No, this dragon needs a good name." Drake looks carefully at the dragon. He looks at his long, brown body.

sentences.text: Right away, the dragon lifts his head.
He stares at Drake with his big, green eyes.
"You must name your dragon," he says.
"No, this dragon needs a good name."
Drake looks carefully at the dragon.
He looks at his long, brown body.

blocks.text: "Worm," he says. "His name is Worm." "That is a good name for an Earth Dragon," says Griffith, opening the gate. "Now, Drake, ask Worm to follow you." "Okay," Drake says. "Worm, please follow me." Worm crawls forward. "Good work!" says the wizard. "Keep it up, Drake." "Come on," Drake says, starting to walk down the hallway. Worm crawls after him. "He really is like a big, ugly worm," Rori says. "Rori, be nice," says Ana.

sentences.text: "That is a good name for an Earth Dragon," says Griffith, opening the gate.
"Now, Drake, ask Worm to follow you."
"Come on," Drake says, starting to walk down the hallway.
"He really is like a big, ugly worm," Rori says.

blocks.text: Drake doesn't say anything. Worm is like a big worm. "Where are we going?" he asks. "To the Training Room," Griffith replies. "Yeah," says Rori. "We'll see what you and your dragon are made of." Drake feels nervous. He touches his Dragon Stone. How am I suppose to train a dragon? he thinks. What if I fail? What if I'm not a Dragon Master after all?

sentences.text: Worm is like a big worm.
"We'll see what you and your dragon are made of."
How am I suppose to train a dragon?
What if I'm not a Dragon Master after all?
